name: Tim Kaine
subject: Keep up the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek --

In 2012, Republicans and their special interest groups spent $28 million on my race trying to install a rubber stamp for their agenda. **Now that they 're on the cusp of a 60-seat supermajority, we have to do everything we can to make sure they don't get one.**

I'm fighting to protect Virginians' health care, Social Security, Medicaid, and a woman's right to choose. **Republicans in Washington don 't want someone like me -- they want someone who will do whatever special interests say. Don't let them get their wish, Derek. [Pitch in before our big end-of-month deadline.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=d9q1CTnC9WiyFVe7h9iak5W00V%2BGQiiI)**

Virginians want a senator who will always fight for the needs of the Commonwealth -- including passing commonsense gun safety legislation, protecting the Chesapeake Bay, investing in our children's education, and supporting servicemembers and their families across Virginia.

**[Please pitch in and help my team out today.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=1c3gBGEAYIAkkDTCrnVteJW00V%2BGQiiI)**

Thank you,
Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=cFQMGfOO%2Fx88wGk1zwPdVJW00V%2BGQiiI)
---
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RDZYg4Vw47kB7JaT719rRmPTWRcQAtvc).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Democrats.org
subject: If you agree with Heather Booth...
body:
Let's get to work. **Pitch in whatever you can before our May deadline to help Democrats start the summer with momentum on our side.

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd1a/4067b0a/294b55f30/7e76dfec/983967640/VEsHAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170527_dnc_nd&source=em_20170527_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170527_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd1a/4067b0a/294b55f30/7e76dfed/983967640/VEsHAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170527_dnc_nd&source=em_20170527_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170527_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd1a/4067b0a/294b55f30/7e76dfea/983967640/VEsHAw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170527_dnc_nd&source=em_20170527_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170527_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd1a/4067b0a/294b55f30/7e76dfeb/983967640/VEsHAg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170527_dnc_nd&source=em_20170527_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170527_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Team Maggie
subject: update re. top races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a5/618261061/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a5/618261061/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team, we wanted to give you a quick update on two of the top races you're hearing about:
First, early voting in Georgia's special election starts in just THREE DAYS.
Outside money is pouring in against Democrat Jon Ossoff, and the negative ads are making an impact -- recent polls show that Jon is slipping. [**Donate $3 or more to help secure one of the first major Democratic victories of the Trump era.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a6/618261061/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI2X213aDRoaGpvX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170526_mwh4hhjo_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Second, Republicans are zeroing in on Senator Heidi Heitkamp in North Dakota.
FIVE right-wing groups have already flooded the airwaves with attacks against Heidi -- all so that they can elect another rubberstamp for Donald Trump and Steve Bannon. [**Please give $3 or more now to protect this Democratic Senate seat and help re-elect Heidi.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a6/618261061/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI2X213aDRoaGpvX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170526_mwh4hhjo_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Both Heidi and Jon are facing extremely tough elections, and they're going to need all of the help they can get from strong grassroots supporters like you if they're going to win.
[**Donate $3 now, before tomorrow 's weekend deadline, to help them build up the resources to withstand Republicans' attacks.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a6/618261061/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI2X213aDRoaGpvX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170526_mwh4hhjo_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jon Ossoff, Heidi Heitkamp and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a7/618261061/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI2X213aDRoaGpvX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170526_mwh4hhjo_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a0/618261061/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI2X213aDRoaGpvX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170526_mwh4hhjo_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a1/618261061/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI2X213aDRoaGpvX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170526_mwh4hhjo_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a6/618261061/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI2X213aDRoaGpvX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170526_mwh4hhjo_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for doing your part to elect Democrats,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea2/2a380d31/1a6bf245/fe86a6/618261061/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoLTQtam9oaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNTI2X213aDRoaGpvX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh-4-johh?refcode=e20170526_mwh4hhjo_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: 23 MILLION? [SIGN ON]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
I was sure this new version of Trumpcare wouldn't be any better -- and it's even worse.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTExMjA5ODIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MjMwNjIyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) | **BREAKING NEWS:**
**CBO Results Released for Trumpcare: 23 million Americans without Insurance!**
| [TAKE ACTION »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTExMjA5ODIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MjMwNjIyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Dear Friend,
I can't say that I am shocked.
Republicans in Congress rushed Trumpcare through the House without knowing or caring what the consequences would be. This was a regressive, damaging move by the Trump administration, and is another broken promise by this president that will hurt the hard-working men and women who elected him. It's political pandering at its worst.
Now, as the Senate prepares its own version of Trumpcare, we have all the terrible facts laid out in a new non-partisan Congressional Budget Office report: **23 million people would lose their insurance.**
Republicans are determined to turn a blind eye to 23 million Americans who would lose their insurance. We need to show them they can't get away with it. We won't let them make America sicker -- so they can line the pockets of their wealthy supporters with additional tax cuts.
[**Tell Republicans in the Senate today: Don 't pass Trumpcare 2.0 and hurt millions of Americans!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTExMjA5ODIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MjMwNjIyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
This plan is just more of the same: Millions and millions of people uninsured, higher premiums, and no protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
This plan is bad for America!
But that's not it -- the Trump administration just released a disastrous budget plan, which slashes billions in funding to health care programs like Medicaid -- 700,000 Washingtonians would lose their health insurance. Republicans are waging a war on our health. It's time to put a stop to it.
[**Join me in urging Senate Republicans to say NO to President Trump 's new health care bill!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTExMjA5ODIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MjMwNjIyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=11120982&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTE2MjMwNjIyNgS2&l=6586026&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
---
All content (C) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved
PO Box 21067, Seattle, WA 98111
[Privacy Policy](http://www.jayinslee.com/privacy)

name: Contest via Team Ryan
subject: Flights included
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

When was the last time you visited our nation's capital?

With summer approaching, it's a perfect time to visit.

Even better? You could join Vice President Pence and Speaker Ryan at a dinner in Washington, D.C. If you win, we'll cover your flights and hotel accommodations.

[**Enter now to win a trip to our nation 's capital >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjkxNjQ4MjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU1MzE2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjkxNjQ4MjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU1MzE2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

This is your chance to see President Trump's second in command!

Good luck!

Team Ryan

name: urgent-alert@dscc.org
subject: If we do this, we can stop Obamacare repeal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We can't take our eyes off of health care right now -- not even for a moment.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170527-UrgentAlert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

_**Washington Post: "Senators hope to have their own health-care draft after next week's recess"**_
Team,

We can't take our eyes off of health care right now -- not even for a moment. According to _The Washington Post_ , Senate Republicans will have a draft bill as early as a week from now.

We saw how quickly the House health care bill moved forward. After just one meeting at the White House, key Republican representatives flipped their votes and the bill passed mere days later.

We can't let the same thing happen in the Senate. As senators head home for recess, this week is our best chance to stop Obamacare repeal once and for all.

[**We 're going all in on ads exposing the cost of repeal and showing Republicans the price they'll pay in 2018 for eliminating coverage and raising costs. Chip in $1 before the FEC deadline to help fund our ads.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170527-UrgentAlert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

While the Senate health care bill is nearly drafted, there's hope -- _The Washington Post_ also reported that key GOP senators are on the fence about the law's provisions.

That means that if we put enough pressure on key Republicans this week to reject the bill, we can stop the GOP repeal plan before it reaches the Senate floor.

**So as we approach the critical FEC deadline, we 're ramping our resources to fund our ads and stop Obamacare repeal in its tracks. Chip in $1 to fight Obamacare repeal:**

[**http://dscc.org/stop-the-bill**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170527-UrgentAlert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e608/2b07114c/5695e023/736e5649/2920441035/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e608/2b07114c/5695e023/736e5648/2920441035/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e608/2b07114c/5695e023/736e564b/2920441035/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Trump's budget hurts the most vulnerable
body:
Stand with Democrats against Trump's new budget.
---
**Help stop Donald Trump's assault on working Americans. Say you'll fight to elect Democrats who will stand up to the Trump agenda:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170527_ke_nd&source=em_20170527_ke_nd")**

Derek, even I was shocked the first time I read Donald Trump's budget proposal. It's almost hard to believe that he expects anyone to take this seriously. But it's just the latest piece of an agenda that is dangerous for all Americans.

**[So we have to elect Democrats who will stand up to Trump and fight for our values -- because there are real human costs if we allow Donald Trump's agenda to become reality.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+So+we+have+to+elect+Democrats+who+will+s&utm_campaign=em_20170527_ke_nd&source=em_20170527_ke_nd")**

The $800 billion he'd take away from Medicaid means more people going without treatment and prescriptions because they can't afford the care they need. The $9 billion he'd strip from education means fewer teachers and resources to help our children get ahead. The almost $200 billion he'd remove from programs like SNAP, which funds food stamps for people in need, will take plates off the table in millions of households all over the country -- in red states and blue ones.

This is a sad day for the American people. Trump has presented a budget that would fail to take care of our most vulnerable, leave our children woefully unprepared for the challenges of tomorrow, and do a truly incalculable amount of damage to millions of American families.

Democrats must stand together to make sure we're building an economy that works for every American, not just those at the top.

**Add your name to help elect Democrats who will stand against the Trump agenda and fight for every person in this country to have the opportunity to succeed:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170527_ke_nd&source=em_20170527_ke_nd")**
Thanks for stepping up, Derek.

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd16/4067b0a/293ad6008/7e76dc44/1921979416/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170527_ke_nd&source=em_20170527_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd16/4067b0a/293ad6008/7e76dc45/1921979416/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170527_ke_nd&source=em_20170527_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd16/4067b0a/293ad6008/7e76dc42/1921979416/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170527_ke_nd&source=em_20170527_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd16/4067b0a/293ad6008/7e76dc43/1921979416/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170527_ke_nd&source=em_20170527_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

Say you'll fight to elect Democrats who will stand up to the Trump agenda: "" Derek, even I was shocked the first time I read Donald Trump's budget proposal. It's almost hard to believe that he expects anyone to take this seriously. But it's just the latest piece of an agenda that is dangerous for all Americans. "" The $800 billion he'd take away from Medicaid means more people going without treatment and prescriptions because they can't afford the care they need. The $9 billion he'd strip from education means fewer teachers and resources to help our children get ahead. The almost $200 billion he'd remove from programs like SNAP, which funds food stamps for people in need, will take plates off the table in millions of households all over the country -- in red states and blue ones. This is a sad day for the American people. Trump has presented a budget that would fail to take care of our most vulnerable, leave our children woefully unprepared for the challenges of tomorrow, and do a truly incalculable amount of damage to millions of American families. Democrats must stand together to make sure we're building an economy that works for every American, not just those at the top. Add your name to help elect Democrats who will stand against the Trump agenda and fight for every person in this country to have the opportunity to succeed: "" Thanks for stepping up, Derek. Keith Keith Ellison Deputy Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Ryan
subject: Will you stop the Left?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend --

The Democrats are in a frenzy.

After losing two consecutive special elections, they're on a war path with one target in mind: Georgia.

They're funneling all their resources into Georgia's special election.**And their resources are considerable -- from Hollywood celebrities to Washington insiders, the Left 's war chest is overflowing.**

With the last fundraising deadline before Georgia's special election quickly approaching, this is our last chance to try to keep pace with the Democrats.

**Will you help keep us in the running?** [**Chip in $50 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjkxNjUzMjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU1NjQ0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

[**Chip in $25 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjkxNjUzMjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU1NjQ0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

[**Chip in $10 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjkxNjUzMjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU1NjQ0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

[**Chip in $5 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjkxNjUzMjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU1NjQ0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

History has shown that the Left is resilient. Even one win could cause the type of mobilization we saw in 2008. That means we can't let them get any momentum.

Friend, will you be part of the movement to stop the Left?

Thank you,

Team Ryan

| [Stop the Left now ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjkxNjUzMjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MzU1NjQ0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
